targets.rawSql:
WITH NgLots AS (
    SELECT
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) AS prod_date,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Cycle Time (sec)])) AS FLOAT) AS ct_sec,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.]))     AS part_no,
        [Identical ID],
        [Lot],
        [Judgement [S]]],
        TRY_CONVERT(TIME, [Production Date [S]]]) AS prod_time,
        MAX(CASE WHEN [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_ng,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name]))       AS part_name,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.]))    AS material_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.]))          AS oi_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.])) AS sample_part_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material]))    AS lot_material,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD]))   AS condition_std,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member]))       AS qc_member_val
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE
        [Part Type] = 'Injection'
        AND [Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Cycle Time (sec)])) AS FLOAT) BETWEEN 1 AND 300
        AND [Judgement [S]]] IN ('O', 'X')
        AND (
            '${ct_month:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CASE CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
                WHEN 1  THEN 'Jan' WHEN 2  THEN 'Feb' WHEN 3  THEN 'Mar'
                WHEN 4  THEN 'Apr' WHEN 5  THEN 'May' WHEN 6  THEN 'Jun'
                WHEN 7  THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8  THEN 'Aug' WHEN 9  THEN 'Sep'
                WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct' WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dec'
               END IN (${ct_month:singlequote})
        )
        AND ('${ct_year:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) IN (${ct_year:singlequote}))
        AND ('${ct_mc_no:csv}'   = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))     IN (${ct_mc_no:singlequote}))
        AND ('${ct_mold:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.]))    IN (${ct_mold:singlequote}))
        AND ('${ct_part_no:csv}' = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.]))    IN (${ct_part_no:singlequote}))
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATETIME, [Production Date [S]]]) >= $__timeFrom()
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATETIME, [Production Date [S]]]) <= $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Cycle Time (sec)])) AS FLOAT),
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])),
        [Identical ID], [Lot], [Judgement [S]]],
        TRY_CONVERT(TIME, [Production Date [S]]]),
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name])),
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.])),
        LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.])),
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.])),
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material])),
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD])),
        LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member]))
),
NgLots_clean AS (
    SELECT * FROM NgLots
    WHERE prod_date IS NOT NULL
),
d_part_name AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, ct_sec, part_name      FROM NgLots_clean),
d_material  AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, ct_sec, material_no    FROM NgLots_clean),
d_oi        AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, ct_sec, oi_no          FROM NgLots_clean),
d_sample    AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, ct_sec, sample_part_no FROM NgLots_clean),
d_lot       AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, ct_sec, lot_material   FROM NgLots_clean),
d_cond      AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, ct_sec, condition_std  FROM NgLots_clean),
d_qc        AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, ct_sec, qc_member_val  FROM NgLots_clean),
agg_part_name AS (SELECT prod_date, ct_sec, STRING_AGG(part_name,      ' / ') AS part_name_agg      FROM d_part_name GROUP BY prod_date, ct_sec),
agg_material  AS (SELECT prod_date, ct_sec, STRING_AGG(material_no,    ' / ') AS material_no_agg    FROM d_material  GROUP BY prod_date, ct_sec),
agg_oi        AS (SELECT prod_date, ct_sec, STRING_AGG(oi_no,          ' / ') AS oi_no_agg          FROM d_oi        GROUP BY prod_date, ct_sec),
agg_sample    AS (SELECT prod_date, ct_sec, STRING_AGG(sample_part_no, ' / ') AS sample_part_no_agg FROM d_sample    GROUP BY prod_date, ct_sec),
agg_lot       AS (SELECT prod_date, ct_sec, STRING_AGG(lot_material,   ' / ') AS lot_material_agg   FROM d_lot       GROUP BY prod_date, ct_sec),
agg_cond      AS (SELECT prod_date, ct_sec, STRING_AGG(condition_std,  ' / ') AS condition_std_agg  FROM d_cond      GROUP BY prod_date, ct_sec),
agg_qc        AS (SELECT prod_date, ct_sec, STRING_AGG(qc_member_val,  ' / ') AS qc_member_agg      FROM d_qc        GROUP BY prod_date, ct_sec),
NgByDate AS (
    SELECT
        n.prod_date,
        n.ct_sec,
        CASE WHEN SUM(n.is_ng) > 0 THEN n.ct_sec ELSE NULL END AS ng_cycle_time_sec_marker,
        CASE WHEN SUM(n.is_ng) > 0
             THEN STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN n.is_ng = 1 THEN n.part_no END, ' | ')
             ELSE NULL END                                       AS part_no_on_breakdown,
        MAX(CASE WHEN n.is_ng = 1 AND n.[Judgement [S]]] = 'X'
                 THEN n.prod_time END)                           AS ng_production_time,
        MAX(apn.part_name_agg)      AS part_name,
        MAX(am.material_no_agg)     AS material_no,
        MAX(ao.oi_no_agg)           AS oi_no,
        MAX(asa.sample_part_no_agg) AS sample_part_no,
        MAX(al.lot_material_agg)    AS lot_material,
        MAX(ac.condition_std_agg)   AS condition_std,
        MAX(aq.qc_member_agg)       AS qc_member
    FROM NgLots_clean        n
    LEFT JOIN agg_part_name apn ON apn.prod_date = n.prod_date AND apn.ct_sec = n.ct_sec
    LEFT JOIN agg_material   am ON am.prod_date  = n.prod_date AND am.ct_sec  = n.ct_sec
    LEFT JOIN agg_oi         ao ON ao.prod_date  = n.prod_date AND ao.ct_sec  = n.ct_sec
    LEFT JOIN agg_sample    asa ON asa.prod_date = n.prod_date AND asa.ct_sec = n.ct_sec
    LEFT JOIN agg_lot        al ON al.prod_date  = n.prod_date AND al.ct_sec  = n.ct_sec
    LEFT JOIN agg_cond       ac ON ac.prod_date  = n.prod_date AND ac.ct_sec  = n.ct_sec
    LEFT JOIN agg_qc         aq ON aq.prod_date  = n.prod_date AND aq.ct_sec  = n.ct_sec
    GROUP BY n.prod_date, n.ct_sec
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN ng.ng_production_time IS NOT NULL
        THEN CAST(
                CAST(TRY_CONVERT(DATE, m.[Production Date [S]]]) AS DATETIME)
                + CAST(ng.ng_production_time AS DATETIME)
             AS DATETIME)
        ELSE CAST(TRY_CONVERT(DATE, m.[Production Date [S]]]) AS DATETIME)
    END                                                            AS time,
    TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Cycle Time (sec)])) AS FLOAT)         AS cycle_time_sec,
    ng.ng_cycle_time_sec_marker,
    ng.part_no_on_breakdown,
    ng.ng_production_time                                          AS ng_judgement_x_production_time,
    ng.part_name      AS [Part Name],
    ng.material_no    AS [Material No.],
    ng.oi_no          AS [OI No.],
    ng.sample_part_no AS [Sample Part No.],
    ng.lot_material   AS [Lot Material],
    ng.condition_std  AS [Condition STD],
    ng.qc_member      AS [QC Member]
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database] AS m
LEFT JOIN NgByDate AS ng
    ON  TRY_CONVERT(DATE, m.[Production Date [S]]]) = ng.prod_date
    AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Cycle Time (sec)])) AS FLOAT) = ng.ct_sec
WHERE
    [Part Type] = 'Injection'
    AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Cycle Time (sec)])) AS FLOAT) BETWEEN 1 AND 300
    AND m.[Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, m.[Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATETIME, m.[Production Date [S]]]) >= $__timeFrom()
    AND TRY_CONVERT(DATETIME, m.[Production Date [S]]]) <= $__timeTo()
    AND (
        '${ct_month:csv}' = 'All'
        OR CASE CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Month Record])) AS INT)
                WHEN 1  THEN 'Jan' WHEN 2  THEN 'Feb' WHEN 3  THEN 'Mar'
                WHEN 4  THEN 'Apr' WHEN 5  THEN 'May' WHEN 6  THEN 'Jun'
                WHEN 7  THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8  THEN 'Aug' WHEN 9  THEN 'Sep'
                WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct' WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dec'
           END IN (${ct_month:singlequote})
    )
    AND ('${ct_year:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Year Record]))  IN (${ct_year:singlequote}))
    AND ('${ct_mc_no:csv}'   = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[M/C No.]))      IN (${ct_mc_no:singlequote}))
    AND ('${ct_mold:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Mold No.]))     IN (${ct_mold:singlequote}))
    AND ('${ct_part_no:csv}' = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Part No.]))     IN (${ct_part_no:singlequote}))
ORDER BY time

WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        -- ✅ ใช้ TRY_CONVERT แทน CAST → ป้องกัน out-of-range error
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) AS prod_date,
        [Judgement [S]]],
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.]))            AS part_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name]))           AS part_name,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.]))        AS material_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.]))              AS oi_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.]))     AS sample_part_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material]))        AS lot_material,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD]))       AS condition_std,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member]))           AS qc_member_val
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE
        [Judgement [S]]] IN ('O', 'X')
        AND [Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
        -- ✅ กรอง row ที่แปลงไม่ได้ออกก่อน
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Cycle Time (sec)])) AS FLOAT) BETWEEN 1 AND 300
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATETIME, [Production Date [S]]]) >= $__timeFrom()
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATETIME, [Production Date [S]]]) <= $__timeTo()
        AND ('${ct_year:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) IN (${ct_year:singlequote}))
        AND ('${ct_mc_no:csv}'   = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))     IN (${ct_mc_no:singlequote}))
        AND ('${ct_mold:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.]))    IN (${ct_mold:singlequote}))
        AND ('${ct_part_no:csv}' = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.]))    IN (${ct_part_no:singlequote}))
),
-- ✅ กรอง prod_date NULL ออก (rows ที่แปลงไม่ได้)
base_clean AS (
    SELECT * FROM base
    WHERE prod_date IS NOT NULL
),
d_part_name AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, part_name      FROM base_clean),
d_material  AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, material_no    FROM base_clean),
d_oi        AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, oi_no          FROM base_clean),
d_sample    AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, sample_part_no FROM base_clean),
d_lot       AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, lot_material   FROM base_clean),
d_cond      AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, condition_std  FROM base_clean),
d_qc        AS (SELECT DISTINCT prod_date, qc_member_val  FROM base_clean),
agg_pn  AS (SELECT prod_date, STRING_AGG(part_name,      ' / ') AS part_name_agg      FROM d_part_name GROUP BY prod_date),
agg_mat AS (SELECT prod_date, STRING_AGG(material_no,    ' / ') AS material_no_agg    FROM d_material  GROUP BY prod_date),
agg_oi  AS (SELECT prod_date, STRING_AGG(oi_no,          ' / ') AS oi_no_agg          FROM d_oi        GROUP BY prod_date),
agg_sp  AS (SELECT prod_date, STRING_AGG(sample_part_no, ' / ') AS sample_part_no_agg FROM d_sample    GROUP BY prod_date),
agg_lot AS (SELECT prod_date, STRING_AGG(lot_material,   ' / ') AS lot_material_agg   FROM d_lot       GROUP BY prod_date),
agg_cnd AS (SELECT prod_date, STRING_AGG(condition_std,  ' / ') AS condition_std_agg  FROM d_cond      GROUP BY prod_date),
agg_qc  AS (SELECT prod_date, STRING_AGG(qc_member_val,  ' / ') AS qc_member_agg      FROM d_qc        GROUP BY prod_date)
SELECT
    CAST(b.prod_date AS DATETIME)            AS time,
    STRING_AGG(
        CASE WHEN b.[Judgement [S]]] = 'X'
             THEN b.part_no END, ' | '
    )                                        AS part_no_on_breakdown,
    MAX(apn.part_name_agg)                   AS [Part Name],
    MAX(am.material_no_agg)                  AS [Material No.],
    MAX(ao.oi_no_agg)                        AS [OI No.],
    MAX(asp.sample_part_no_agg)              AS [Sample Part No.],
    MAX(al.lot_material_agg)                 AS [Lot Material],
    MAX(ac.condition_std_agg)                AS [Condition STD],
    MAX(aq.qc_member_agg)                    AS [QC Member]
FROM base_clean              b
LEFT JOIN agg_pn  apn ON apn.prod_date = b.prod_date
LEFT JOIN agg_mat  am ON am.prod_date  = b.prod_date
LEFT JOIN agg_oi   ao ON ao.prod_date  = b.prod_date
LEFT JOIN agg_sp  asp ON asp.prod_date = b.prod_date
LEFT JOIN agg_lot  al ON al.prod_date  = b.prod_date
LEFT JOIN agg_cnd  ac ON ac.prod_date  = b.prod_date
LEFT JOIN agg_qc   aq ON aq.prod_date  = b.prod_date
GROUP BY b.prod_date
ORDER BY time

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    [M/C No.] AS __text,
    [M/C No.] AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([M/C No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${ct_mold:singlequote})                -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
ORDER BY __value
list.label: M/C No.
list.name: ct_mc_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    [M/C No.] AS __text,
    [M/C No.] AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([M/C No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${ct_mold:singlequote})                -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))                    -- ✅ __value เป็นชื่อเดือนด้วย
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Month Record]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
) AS t
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
list.label: Month
list.name: ct_month
list.query:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))                    -- ✅ __value เป็นชื่อเดือนด้วย
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Month Record]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
) AS t
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT TRIM([Year Record]) AS value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY value
list.label: Year
list.name: ct_year
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT TRIM([Year Record]) AS value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) NOT LIKE '0%'
  AND LEN(TRIM([Mold No.])) > 1
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'     -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Mold No.
list.name: ct_mold
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) NOT LIKE '0%'
  AND LEN(TRIM([Mold No.])) > 1
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'     -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Part No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${ct_mold:singlequote})                -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND [M/C No.]        IN (${ct_mc_no:singlequote})               -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Part No.
list.name: ct_part_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Part No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${ct_mold:singlequote})                -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND [M/C No.]        IN (${ct_mc_no:singlequote})               -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value
